packs.title: Visuals Demo (math + diagrams)
packs.description: Tiny pack to verify lesson reading, LaTeX math, and SVG diagram rendering. Safe to install and delete.

packs.title: Mathematics
packs.description: Mathematics from scratch for complete beginners: 12 sub-topics from algebra and trigonometry through calculus, linear algebra, transforms, probability, and detection & estimation. Beginner-first readings, a diagram in nearly every lesson, MCQ practice, tiered easy to hard.

packs.title: Analog Electronics
packs.description: Analog electronics from scratch for complete beginners: 15 sub-topics from DC circuits and Ohm's law through transistors, op-amps, filters, oscillators, power supplies, noise and instrumentation. Beginner-first readings, a diagram in nearly every lesson, MCQ practice, tiered easy to hard.

packs.title: Digital Electronics
packs.description: Digital electronics from scratch for complete beginners: 14 sub-topics from binary and Boolean logic through gates, flip-flops, state machines, memory, ADC/DAC, HDL and FPGAs. Beginner-first readings, a diagram in nearly every lesson, MCQ practice, tiered easy to hard.

packs.title: Embedded Systems
packs.description: Embedded systems from scratch for complete beginners: 15 sub-topics from the bare-metal memory map and GPIO through interrupts, timers, serial buses, DMA, RTOS, real-time design, bootloaders, and DSP on microcontrollers. Beginner-first readings, a diagram in nearly every lesson, MCQ practice, tiered easy to hard.

packs.title: Linux Systems
packs.description: Linux from scratch for complete beginners: 19 sub-topics from the shell, files and permissions through processes, systemd, the kernel, package management, text processing, bash scripting, containers, storage, networking, and embedded Linux. Beginner-first readings, a diagram in nearly every lesson, MCQ practice, tiered easy to hard.

packs.title: Networking
packs.description: Networking from scratch for complete beginners: 17 sub-topics from layering and the physical layer through MAC/Ethernet, IP, subnetting, routing, IPv6, DHCP/NAT/DNS, TCP/UDP, TLS, HTTP, troubleshooting, wireless, IoT and software-defined networking. Beginner-first readings, MCQ practice, and a diagram in nearly every lesson, tiered easy to hard.

packs.title: Wave Propagation
packs.description: Electromagnetic waves from scratch (beginner rework in progress): 13 sub-topics from fields and Maxwell through plane waves, transmission lines, the Smith chart, antennas, beamforming, propagation and link budgets. Physical intuition first with the heavy math turned into plain ideas; MCQ practice and diagrams, tiered easy to hard.

packs.title: Physics
packs.description: Physics from scratch for complete beginners: 15 sub-topics from measurement and motion through forces, energy, waves, heat, electricity, light and a peek at modern physics. Beginner-first readings, a diagram in nearly every lesson, tiered easy to hard.
